title: anthoxanthum angustum
intro: Anthoxanthum angustum, also known as narrow-leaved oat grass or bottlebrush grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum angustum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Anthoxanthum angustum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
